summary: TWO_COLUMN stacked: top axes with BLUE stem plot of x[n] = cos(2π·2n/N) + 0.6 cos(2π·5n/N) + 0.4 cos(2π·9n/N); bottom axes with RED |X[k]| DFT magnitude spectrum. ValueTracker n_samples_tr grows 4→32; always_redraw on both — peaks at k=2, 5, 9 emerge and sharpen. Live panel notes peak structure.
